title: blepharis spathularis
intro: Blepharis spathularis, also known as the Blue Ear or Spathularis Blepharis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Blepharis spathularis include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of gastrointestinal problems. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make a paste or tincture for topical application.
